draft_prompts.planner: Given the input vector of points, design a plan for distributing the computation across multiple ranks using MPI, and identify opportunities for parallelization within each rank using OpenMP. Assume that every rank has a complete copy of the points.
draft_prompts.code_gen: Based on the plan designed by the planner, generate C++ code that implements the parallel computation of the convex hull perimeter. The code should use MPI to distribute the computation across multiple ranks and OpenMP to parallelize within each rank.
draft_prompts.tester: Take the generated C++ code and test it on a sample input to ensure that it produces the correct output. Additionally, measure the performance of the code using MPI and OpenMP to identify opportunities for optimization.
